notes: Expected focus: ABC Song.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch ABC Song.
pedagogicalFrame.rationaleVi: Bai hoc nay dung goi y ngan truoc khi xem, huong chu y, goi lai va van dung de nguoi hoc khong chi xem thu dong bai Bài hát ABC.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailEn: Use bilingual support as a cue, not as a wall of text that competes with the video.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailVi: Dung ho tro song ngu nhu mot goi y, khong bien no thanh buc tu day dac tranh chu y voi video.

learningObjectives.en: Identify the main idea of ABC Song and keep attention on the right content cues.
learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Bài hát ABC va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

learningObjectives.en: Notice and recall core language such as 26 and abc.
learningObjectives.vi: Nhan ra va goi lai ngon ngu cot loi nhu 26 va bảng chữ cái.

learningObjectives.en: Use the video as input for sound-letter matching and early decoding, then produce one short response of your own.
learningObjectives.vi: Dung video lam dau vao cho ghép âm với chữ và giải mã sớm, roi tu tao mot phan hoi ngan cua rieng minh.

learningObjectives.en: A key fact in this lesson is 26.
learningObjectives.vi: Mot thong tin chinh trong bai hoc nay la 26.

focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "26" khi hoc bai Bài hát ABC.
Dung "abc" khi hoc bai Bài hát ABC.
Dung "song" khi hoc bai Bài hát ABC.
Dung "listen" khi hoc bai Bài hát ABC.
Dung "repeat" khi hoc bai Bài hát ABC.
Dung "match" khi hoc bai Bài hát ABC.

segments.label: Preview
segments.en: Today we study ABC Song. Predict what the video should teach before you press play.
segments.vi: Hom nay chung ta hoc Bài hát ABC. Hay doan truoc video se day gi truoc khi bam phat.

segments.label: Watch Cue
segments.en: Repeat the sound, point to the letter, and notice the matching picture while the video stays on ABC Song.
segments.vi: Lặp lại âm, chỉ vào chữ cái và chú ý tranh tương ứng khi video tap trung vao Bài hát ABC.

segments.label: Focus Words
segments.en: Listen for these anchor words: 26, abc, song.
segments.vi: Hay nghe cac tu moc nay: 26, bảng chữ cái, bài hát.

segments.label: Anchor Idea
segments.en: A key fact in this lesson is 26.
segments.vi: Mot thong tin chinh trong bai hoc nay la 26.

segments.label: Retrieve
segments.en: Pause the video and say three things you remember about ABC Song without looking at the screen.
segments.vi: Tam dung video va noi ba dieu ban con nho ve Bài hát ABC ma khong nhin man hinh.

segments.label: Transfer
segments.en: Say the sound, then name one example word.
segments.vi: Nói âm đó rồi nêu một từ ví dụ.

researchBasis.label: Distributed recall
researchBasis.whyEn: The packet asks for replay, retell, and next-day review instead of one-shot viewing.
researchBasis.whyVi: Goi hoc lieu yeu cau xem lai, ke lai va on vao hom sau thay vi xem mot lan roi bo.

quiz.explanation: A correct lesson should stay aligned with its intended title and classification.
quiz.explanationVi: Mot bai hoc dung phai giu su thang hang voi tieu de va phan loai du kien.

quiz.q: While watching "Count by 5s", which cue should the learner track?
quiz.qVi: Khi xem "Đếm nhảy 5", nguoi hoc nen theo doi dau hieu nao?

options.en: Watch for the skip-count pattern in steps of 5 and clap each jump.
options.vi: Hay de y mau dem cach 5 va vo tay moi lan nhay so.

options.en: Ignore the key cue and only wait for subtitles.
options.vi: Bo qua dau hieu chinh va chi doi phu de.

options.en: Focus on every detail equally and avoid pausing or repeating.
options.vi: Tap trung vao moi chi tiet nhu nhau va khong tam dung hay lap lai.

options.en: Memorize random words without checking the lesson goal.
options.vi: Hoc thuoc tu ngau nhien ma khong kiem tra muc tieu bai hoc.

quiz.explanation: This cue directs attention to the information that matters most in the lesson.
quiz.explanationVi: Dau hieu nay giup huong su chu y vao thong tin quan trong nhat cua bai hoc.

quiz.explanation: This detail question is preserved from the legacy curriculum because it captures a concrete content checkpoint for Count by 5s.
quiz.explanationVi: Cau hoi chi tiet nay duoc giu lai tu curriculum cu vi no nho den mot moc noi dung cu the cho bai Đếm nhảy 5.

quiz.q: Which Vietnamese cue best matches "count by 5s" in this lesson?
quiz.qVi: Goi y tieng Viet nao hop nhat voi "count by 5s" trong bai hoc nay?
quiz.explanation: A learner should connect the English anchor word "count by 5s" with a stable meaning cue.
quiz.explanationVi: Nguoi hoc can noi tu moc tieng Anh "count by 5s" voi mot goi y nghia on dinh.

quiz.q: After watching "Count by 5s", what is the strongest next study move?
quiz.qVi: Sau khi xem "Đếm nhảy 5", buoc hoc tiep theo tot nhat la gi?

options.en: Count out loud, then point to real objects around you.
options.vi: Đếm thành tiếng rồi chỉ vào đồ vật thật xung quanh con.

options.en: Move on immediately without speaking, pausing, or recalling anything.
options.vi: Chuyen ngay sang bai khac ma khong noi, tam dung hay goi lai gi.

options.en: Copy every line once and avoid using it in a new example.
options.vi: Chep lai moi dong mot lan va tranh dung no trong vi du moi.

options.en: Only reread the title and assume the content is already mastered.
options.vi: Chi doc lai tieu de va cho rang minh da nam vung noi dung.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch Count by 5s.
pedagogicalFrame.rationaleVi: Bai hoc nay dung goi y ngan truoc khi xem, huong chu y, goi lai va van dung de nguoi hoc khong chi xem thu dong bai Đếm nhảy 5.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailEn: Use bilingual support as a cue, not as a wall of text that competes with the video.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailVi: Dung ho tro song ngu nhu mot goi y, khong bien no thanh buc tu day dac tranh chu y voi video.

learningObjectives.en: Identify the main idea of Count by 5s and keep attention on the right content cues.
learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Đếm nhảy 5 va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

learningObjectives.en: Notice and recall core language such as count by 5s and pattern.
learningObjectives.vi: Nhan ra va goi lai ngon ngu cot loi nhu count 5s va pattern.

learningObjectives.en: Use the video as input for number sense, sequence, and skip counting, then produce one short response of your own.
learningObjectives.vi: Dung video lam dau vao cho cảm nhận số, thứ tự số và đếm cách, roi tu tao mot phan hoi ngan cua rieng minh.

learningObjectives.en: A key answer for this lesson is 20.
learningObjectives.vi: Mot dap an cot loi cua bai hoc nay la 20.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "count by 5s" while studying Count by 5s.
focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "count by 5s" khi hoc bai Đếm nhảy 5.
Dung "pattern" khi hoc bai Đếm nhảy 5.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "skip count" while studying Count by 5s.
focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "skip count" khi hoc bai Đếm nhảy 5.
Dung "20" khi hoc bai Đếm nhảy 5.
Dung "count" khi hoc bai Đếm nhảy 5.
Dung "5s" khi hoc bai Đếm nhảy 5.

segments.label: Preview
segments.en: Today we study Count by 5s. Predict what the video should teach before you press play.
segments.vi: Hom nay chung ta hoc Đếm nhảy 5. Hay doan truoc video se day gi truoc khi bam phat.

segments.label: Watch Cue
segments.en: Watch for the skip-count pattern in steps of 5 and clap each jump.
segments.vi: Hay de y mau dem cach 5 va vo tay moi lan nhay so.

segments.label: Focus Words
segments.en: Listen for these anchor words: count by 5s, pattern, skip count.
segments.vi: Hay nghe cac tu moc nay: count 5s, pattern, skip count.

segments.label: Anchor Idea
segments.en: A key answer for this lesson is 20.
segments.vi: Mot dap an cot loi cua bai hoc nay la 20.

segments.label: Retrieve
segments.en: Pause the video and say three things you remember about Count by 5s without looking at the screen.
segments.vi: Tam dung video va noi ba dieu ban con nho ve Đếm nhảy 5 ma khong nhin man hinh.

segments.label: Transfer
segments.en: Count out loud, then point to real objects around you.
segments.vi: Đếm thành tiếng rồi chỉ vào đồ vật thật xung quanh con.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch I See Something Blue.

pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailVi: Dung ho tro song ngu nhu mot goi y, khong bien no thanh buc tu day dac tranh chu y voi video.

learningObjectives.en: Identify the main idea of I See Something Blue and keep attention on the right content cues.
learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Tôi thấy màu xanh va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

segments.label: Preview
segments.en: Today we study Rainbow Colors. Predict what the video should teach before you press play.
segments.vi: Hom nay chung ta hoc Bảy sắc cầu vồng. Hay doan truoc video se day gi truoc khi bam phat.

segments.label: Watch Cue
segments.en: Look, point, and say the color or shape before the singer repeats it while the video stays on Rainbow Colors.

segments.en: A key fact in this lesson is 7.
segments.vi: Mot thong tin chinh trong bai hoc nay la 7.

segments.label: Retrieve
segments.en: Pause the video and say three things you remember about Rainbow Colors without looking at the screen.
segments.vi: Tam dung video va noi ba dieu ban con nho ve Bảy sắc cầu vồng ma khong nhin man hinh.

segments.label: Transfer
segments.en: Find one real example in the room and name it.
segments.vi: Tìm một ví dụ thật trong phòng rồi gọi tên.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch Wheels on the Bus.
pedagogicalFrame.rationaleVi: Bai hoc nay dung goi y ngan truoc khi xem, huong chu y, goi lai va van dung de nguoi hoc khong chi xem thu dong bai Bánh xe trên xe buýt.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailEn: Use bilingual support as a cue, not as a wall of text that competes with the video.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailVi: Dung ho tro song ngu nhu mot goi y, khong bien no thanh buc tu day dac tranh chu y voi video.

learningObjectives.en: Identify the main idea of Wheels on the Bus and keep attention on the right content cues.
learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Bánh xe trên xe buýt va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

learningObjectives.en: Notice and recall core language such as Round and round and wheels.
learningObjectives.vi: Nhan ra va goi lai ngon ngu cot loi nhu round round va bánh xe.

learningObjectives.en: Use the video as input for story-song recall, rhythm, and repeated language chunks, then produce one short response of your own.

learningObjectives.en: A key answer for this lesson is Round and round.
learningObjectives.vi: Mot dap an cot loi cua bai hoc nay la Round and round.

segments.label: Preview
segments.en: Today we study Wheels on the Bus. Predict what the video should teach before you press play.
segments.vi: Hom nay chung ta hoc Bánh xe trên xe buýt. Hay doan truoc video se day gi truoc khi bam phat.

segments.label: Watch Cue
segments.en: Notice who or what appears in each verse and repeat the chorus pattern while the video stays on Wheels on the Bus.
segments.vi: Để ý nhân vật hoặc sự vật xuất hiện trong từng đoạn và lặp lại mẫu điệp khúc khi video tap trung vao Bánh xe trên xe buýt.

segments.en: Listen for these anchor words: Round and round, wheels, bus.
segments.vi: Hay nghe cac tu moc nay: round round, bánh xe, xe buýt.

segments.label: Anchor Idea
segments.en: A key answer for this lesson is Round and round.
segments.vi: Mot dap an cot loi cua bai hoc nay la Round and round.

segments.label: Retrieve
segments.en: Pause the video and say three things you remember about Wheels on the Bus without looking at the screen.
segments.vi: Tam dung video va noi ba dieu ban con nho ve Bánh xe trên xe buýt ma khong nhin man hinh.

segments.label: Transfer
segments.en: Retell the song with gestures and three key words.
segments.vi: Kể lại bài hát bằng cử chỉ và ba từ khóa.

researchBasis.label: Distributed recall
researchBasis.whyEn: The packet asks for replay, retell, and next-day review instead of one-shot viewing.
researchBasis.whyVi: Goi hoc lieu yeu cau xem lai, ke lai va on vao hom sau thay vi xem mot lan roi bo.

researchBasis.label: Bilingual support
researchBasis.whyEn: Each English line is paired with one concise Vietnamese cue rather than dense duplicate text.
researchBasis.whyVi: Moi dong tieng Anh di kem mot goi y tieng Viet ngan gon thay vi lap lai day dac.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch Self Introduction.
pedagogicalFrame.rationaleVi: Bai hoc nay dung goi y ngan truoc khi xem, huong chu y, goi lai va van dung de nguoi hoc khong chi xem thu dong bai Tự giới thiệu.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailEn: Use bilingual support as a cue, not as a wall of text that competes with the video.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailVi: Dung ho tro song ngu nhu mot goi y, khong bien no thanh buc tu day dac tranh chu y voi video.

learningObjectives.en: Identify the main idea of Self Introduction and keep attention on the right content cues.
learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Tự giới thiệu va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

learningObjectives.en: Notice and recall core language such as My name is... and Name.
learningObjectives.vi: Nhan ra va goi lai ngon ngu cot loi nhu my name is va name.

learningObjectives.en: Use the video as input for functional conversation for everyday situations, then produce one short response of your own.
learningObjectives.vi: Dung video lam dau vao cho hội thoại chức năng cho tình huống hằng ngày, roi tu tao mot phan hoi ngan cua rieng minh.

learningObjectives.en: "My name is..." is linked with Name in this lesson.
learningObjectives.vi: "My name is..." duoc gan voi Name trong bai hoc nay.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "My name is..." while studying Self Introduction.

segments.label: Preview
segments.en: Today we study Self Introduction. Predict what the video should teach before you press play.
segments.vi: Hom nay chung ta hoc Tự giới thiệu. Hay doan truoc video se day gi truoc khi bam phat.

segments.label: Watch Cue
segments.en: Listen for the opening, the key request, and the polite closing while the video stays on Self Introduction.
segments.vi: Nghe câu mở đầu, yêu cầu chính và câu kết lịch sự khi video tap trung vao Tự giới thiệu.

segments.label: Focus Words
segments.en: Listen for these anchor words: My name is..., Name, self.
segments.vi: Hay nghe cac tu moc nay: my name is, name, bản thân.

segments.label: Anchor Idea
segments.en: "My name is..." is linked with Name in this lesson.
segments.vi: "My name is..." duoc gan voi Name trong bai hoc nay.

segments.label: Retrieve
segments.en: Pause the video and say three things you remember about Self Introduction without looking at the screen.
segments.vi: Tam dung video va noi ba dieu ban con nho ve Tự giới thiệu ma khong nhin man hinh.

segments.label: Transfer
segments.en: After watching, record a 20-second response about Self Introduction using one line from the video and one line of your own.
segments.vi: Sau khi xem, hay tu ghi am mot doan 20 giay ve Tự giới thiệu voi mot cau tu video va mot cau cua rieng ban.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch Restaurant Dialogue.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch Modal Verbs.

learningObjectives.en: Identify the main idea of Modal Verbs and keep attention on the right content cues.
learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Động từ khiếm khuyết va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

learningObjectives.en: Notice and recall core language such as Must and Obligation.
learningObjectives.vi: Nhan ra va goi lai ngon ngu cot loi nhu must va obligation.

learningObjectives.en: Use the video as input for form-meaning connection and contrastive grammar control, then produce one short response of your own.

learningObjectives.en: A key answer for this lesson is Obligation.
learningObjectives.vi: Mot dap an cot loi cua bai hoc nay la Obligation.

segments.label: Preview
segments.en: Today we study Modal Verbs. Predict what the video should teach before you press play.
segments.vi: Hom nay chung ta hoc Động từ khiếm khuyết. Hay doan truoc video se day gi truoc khi bam phat.

segments.label: Watch Cue
segments.en: Listen for the signal word, then explain why that grammar choice works while the video stays on Modal Verbs.
segments.vi: Nghe từ tín hiệu rồi giải thích vì sao lựa chọn ngữ pháp đó đúng khi video tap trung vao Động từ khiếm khuyết.

segments.label: Retrieve

segments.label: Transfer
segments.en: Transform one model sentence into a new personal example.
segments.vi: Biến đổi một câu mẫu thành ví dụ cá nhân mới.

learningObjectives.en: Identify the main idea of Passive Voice and keep attention on the right content cues.
learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Câu bị động va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

learningObjectives.en: Notice and recall core language such as The book was written and Passive.
learningObjectives.vi: Nhan ra va goi lai ngon ngu cot loi nhu book was written va bị động.

learningObjectives.en: Use the video as input for form-meaning connection and contrastive grammar control, then produce one short response of your own.
learningObjectives.vi: Dung video lam dau vao cho kết nối hình thức-nghĩa và kiểm soát đối chiếu ngữ pháp, roi tu tao mot phan hoi ngan cua rieng minh.

learningObjectives.en: "The book was written" is linked with Passive in this lesson.
learningObjectives.vi: "The book was written" duoc gan voi Passive trong bai hoc nay.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "The book was written" while studying Passive Voice.
focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "The book was written" khi hoc bai Câu bị động.
Dung "Passive" khi hoc bai Câu bị động.
Dung "voice" khi hoc bai Câu bị động.
Dung "rule" khi hoc bai Câu bị động.
Dung "signal" khi hoc bai Câu bị động.
Dung "form" khi hoc bai Câu bị động.

segments.label: Preview
segments.en: Today we study Passive Voice. Predict what the video should teach before you press play.
segments.vi: Hom nay chung ta hoc Câu bị động. Hay doan truoc video se day gi truoc khi bam phat.

segments.label: Watch Cue
segments.en: Listen for the signal word, then explain why that grammar choice works while the video stays on Passive Voice.
segments.vi: Nghe từ tín hiệu rồi giải thích vì sao lựa chọn ngữ pháp đó đúng khi video tap trung vao Câu bị động.

segments.label: Focus Words
segments.en: Listen for these anchor words: The book was written, Passive, voice.
segments.vi: Hay nghe cac tu moc nay: book was written, bị động, voice.

segments.label: Anchor Idea
segments.en: "The book was written" is linked with Passive in this lesson.
segments.vi: "The book was written" duoc gan voi Passive trong bai hoc nay.

segments.label: Retrieve
segments.en: Pause the video and say three things you remember about Passive Voice without looking at the screen.
segments.vi: Tam dung video va noi ba dieu ban con nho ve Câu bị động ma khong nhin man hinh.

segments.label: Transfer
segments.en: Transform one model sentence into a new personal example.
segments.vi: Biến đổi một câu mẫu thành ví dụ cá nhân mới.

researchBasis.label: Retrieval practice
researchBasis.whyEn: Quiz questions force recall instead of passive rereading.
researchBasis.whyVi: Cau hoi quiz buoc nguoi hoc goi lai thay vi doc lai thu dong.

researchBasis.label: Distributed recall
researchBasis.whyEn: The packet asks for replay, retell, and next-day review instead of one-shot viewing.
researchBasis.whyVi: Goi hoc lieu yeu cau xem lai, ke lai va on vao hom sau thay vi xem mot lan roi bo.

researchBasis.label: Segmenting and signaling
researchBasis.whyEn: Short watch cues reduce overload and highlight what the learner should notice.
researchBasis.whyVi: Cac goi y ngan luc xem giup giam qua tai va lam ro dieu nguoi hoc can chu y.

researchBasis.label: Bilingual support
researchBasis.whyEn: Each English line is paired with one concise Vietnamese cue rather than dense duplicate text.
researchBasis.whyVi: Moi dong tieng Anh di kem mot goi y tieng Viet ngan gon thay vi lap lai day dac.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch Conditionals 2 & 3.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch Express Opinions.
pedagogicalFrame.rationaleVi: Bai hoc nay dung goi y ngan truoc khi xem, huong chu y, goi lai va van dung de nguoi hoc khong chi xem thu dong bai Bày tỏ ý kiến.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailEn: Use bilingual support as a cue, not as a wall of text that competes with the video.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailVi: Dung ho tro song ngu nhu mot goi y, khong bien no thanh buc tu day dac tranh chu y voi video.

learningObjectives.en: Identify the main idea of Express Opinions and keep attention on the right content cues.
learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Bày tỏ ý kiến va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

learningObjectives.en: Notice and recall core language such as In my opinion... and Belief.
learningObjectives.vi: Nhan ra va goi lai ngon ngu cot loi nhu my opinion va belief.

learningObjectives.en: Use the video as input for speaking organization, fluency, and communicative intent, then produce one short response of your own.
learningObjectives.vi: Dung video lam dau vao cho tổ chức nói, độ trôi chảy và mục đích giao tiếp, roi tu tao mot phan hoi ngan cua rieng minh.

learningObjectives.en: A key answer for this lesson is Belief.
learningObjectives.vi: Mot dap an cot loi cua bai hoc nay la Belief.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "In my opinion..." while studying Express Opinions.
focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "In my opinion..." khi hoc bai Bày tỏ ý kiến.

segments.label: Preview
segments.en: Today we study Express Opinions. Predict what the video should teach before you press play.
segments.vi: Hom nay chung ta hoc Bày tỏ ý kiến. Hay doan truoc video se day gi truoc khi bam phat.

segments.label: Watch Cue
segments.en: Listen for the structure, linking phrases, and speaking move while the video stays on Express Opinions.
segments.vi: Nghe cấu trúc, cụm nối và chiến lược nói khi video tap trung vao Bày tỏ ý kiến.

segments.label: Focus Words
segments.en: Listen for these anchor words: In my opinion..., Belief, express.
segments.vi: Hay nghe cac tu moc nay: my opinion, belief, express.

segments.label: Anchor Idea
segments.en: A key answer for this lesson is Belief.
segments.vi: Mot dap an cot loi cua bai hoc nay la Belief.

segments.label: Retrieve
segments.en: Pause the video and say three things you remember about Express Opinions without looking at the screen.
segments.vi: Tam dung video va noi ba dieu ban con nho ve Bày tỏ ý kiến ma khong nhin man hinh.

segments.label: Transfer
segments.en: After watching, record a 20-second response about Express Opinions using one line from the video and one line of your own.
segments.vi: Sau khi xem, hay tu ghi am mot doan 20 giay ve Bày tỏ ý kiến voi mot cau tu video va mot cau cua rieng ban.

quiz.qVi: Tieu de nao phu hop nhat voi noi dung da duoc duyet cua bai hoc nay?
quiz.explanation: A correct lesson should stay aligned with its intended title and classification.
quiz.explanationVi: Mot bai hoc dung phai giu su thang hang voi tieu de va phan loai du kien.

quiz.q: While watching "Small Talk Master", which cue should the learner track?
quiz.qVi: Khi xem "Nói chuyện xã giao", nguoi hoc nen theo doi dau hieu nao?

options.en: Listen for the structure, linking phrases, and speaking move while the video stays on Small Talk Master.
options.vi: Nghe cấu trúc, cụm nối và chiến lược nói khi video tap trung vao Nói chuyện xã giao.

options.en: Ignore the key cue and only wait for subtitles.
options.vi: Bo qua dau hieu chinh va chi doi phu de.

options.en: Focus on every detail equally and avoid pausing or repeating.
options.vi: Tap trung vao moi chi tiet nhu nhau va khong tam dung hay lap lai.

options.en: Memorize random words without checking the lesson goal.
options.vi: Hoc thuoc tu ngau nhien ma khong kiem tra muc tieu bai hoc.

quiz.explanation: This cue directs attention to the information that matters most in the lesson.
quiz.explanationVi: Dau hieu nay giup huong su chu y vao thong tin quan trong nhat cua bai hoc.

quiz.q: Small talk is about...?
quiz.qVi: Nói chuyện xã giao về...?
quiz.explanation: This detail question is preserved from the legacy curriculum because it captures a concrete content checkpoint for Small Talk Master.
quiz.explanationVi: Cau hoi chi tiet nay duoc giu lai tu curriculum cu vi no nho den mot moc noi dung cu the cho bai Nói chuyện xã giao.

quiz.q: Which Vietnamese cue best matches "Weather/hobbies" in this lesson?
quiz.qVi: Goi y tieng Viet nao hop nhat voi "Weather/hobbies" trong bai hoc nay?
quiz.explanation: A learner should connect the English anchor word "Weather/hobbies" with a stable meaning cue.
quiz.explanationVi: Nguoi hoc can noi tu moc tieng Anh "Weather/hobbies" voi mot goi y nghia on dinh.

quiz.q: After watching "Small Talk Master", what is the strongest next study move?
quiz.qVi: Sau khi xem "Nói chuyện xã giao", buoc hoc tiep theo tot nhat la gi?

options.en: After watching, record a 20-second response about Small Talk Master using one line from the video and one line of your own.
options.vi: Sau khi xem, hay tu ghi am mot doan 20 giay ve Nói chuyện xã giao voi mot cau tu video va mot cau cua rieng ban.

options.en: Move on immediately without speaking, pausing, or recalling anything.
options.vi: Chuyen ngay sang bai khac ma khong noi, tam dung hay goi lai gi.

options.en: Copy every line once and avoid using it in a new example.
options.vi: Chep lai moi dong mot lan va tranh dung no trong vi du moi.

options.en: Only reread the title and assume the content is already mastered.
options.vi: Chi doc lai tieu de va cho rang minh da nam vung noi dung.

quiz.explanation: Retrieval plus production helps turn watched input into usable language.
quiz.explanationVi: Goi lai ket hop san sinh ngon ngu giup bien dau vao da xem thanh ngon ngu co the su dung.

notes: Bootstrapped from the legacy YouTube curriculum.
Hidden until a licensed or CC replacement is uploaded to the canonical video CDN and manually approved.
Expected focus: Small Talk Master.
Expected classification: Intermediate / Speaking Skills.
Do not publish until a reviewer confirms that the canonical source matches the intended topic, level, and category.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch Small Talk Master.
pedagogicalFrame.rationaleVi: Bai hoc nay dung goi y ngan truoc khi xem, huong chu y, goi lai va van dung de nguoi hoc khong chi xem thu dong bai Nói chuyện xã giao.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailEn: Use bilingual support as a cue, not as a wall of text that competes with the video.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailVi: Dung ho tro song ngu nhu mot goi y, khong bien no thanh buc tu day dac tranh chu y voi video.

learningObjectives.en: Identify the main idea of Small Talk Master and keep attention on the right content cues.
learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Nói chuyện xã giao va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

learningObjectives.en: Notice and recall core language such as Weather/hobbies and small.
learningObjectives.vi: Nhan ra va goi lai ngon ngu cot loi nhu thời tiết hobbies va small.

learningObjectives.en: Use the video as input for speaking organization, fluency, and communicative intent, then produce one short response of your own.
learningObjectives.vi: Dung video lam dau vao cho tổ chức nói, độ trôi chảy và mục đích giao tiếp, roi tu tao mot phan hoi ngan cua rieng minh.

learningObjectives.en: A key answer for this lesson is Weather/hobbies.
learningObjectives.vi: Mot dap an cot loi cua bai hoc nay la Weather/hobbies.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "Weather/hobbies" while studying Small Talk Master.
focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "Weather/hobbies" khi hoc bai Nói chuyện xã giao.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "small" while studying Small Talk Master.
focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "small" khi hoc bai Nói chuyện xã giao.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "talk" while studying Small Talk Master.
focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "talk" khi hoc bai Nói chuyện xã giao.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "master" while studying Small Talk Master.
focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "master" khi hoc bai Nói chuyện xã giao.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "opinion" while studying Small Talk Master.
focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "opinion" khi hoc bai Nói chuyện xã giao.

focusVocabulary.exampleEn: Use "reason" while studying Small Talk Master.
focusVocabulary.exampleVi: Dung "reason" khi hoc bai Nói chuyện xã giao.

segments.label: Preview
segments.en: Today we study Small Talk Master. Predict what the video should teach before you press play.
segments.vi: Hom nay chung ta hoc Nói chuyện xã giao. Hay doan truoc video se day gi truoc khi bam phat.

segments.label: Watch Cue
segments.en: Listen for the structure, linking phrases, and speaking move while the video stays on Small Talk Master.
segments.vi: Nghe cấu trúc, cụm nối và chiến lược nói khi video tap trung vao Nói chuyện xã giao.

segments.label: Focus Words
segments.en: Listen for these anchor words: Weather/hobbies, small, talk.
segments.vi: Hay nghe cac tu moc nay: thời tiết hobbies, small, nói chuyện.

segments.label: Anchor Idea
segments.en: A key answer for this lesson is Weather/hobbies.
segments.vi: Mot dap an cot loi cua bai hoc nay la Weather/hobbies.

segments.label: Retrieve
segments.en: Pause the video and say three things you remember about Small Talk Master without looking at the screen.
segments.vi: Tam dung video va noi ba dieu ban con nho ve Nói chuyện xã giao ma khong nhin man hinh.

segments.label: Transfer
segments.en: After watching, record a 20-second response about Small Talk Master using one line from the video and one line of your own.
segments.vi: Sau khi xem, hay tu ghi am mot doan 20 giay ve Nói chuyện xã giao voi mot cau tu video va mot cau cua rieng ban.

researchBasis.label: Retrieval practice
researchBasis.whyEn: Quiz questions force recall instead of passive rereading.
researchBasis.whyVi: Cau hoi quiz buoc nguoi hoc goi lai thay vi doc lai thu dong.

researchBasis.label: Distributed recall
researchBasis.whyEn: The packet asks for replay, retell, and next-day review instead of one-shot viewing.
researchBasis.whyVi: Goi hoc lieu yeu cau xem lai, ke lai va on vao hom sau thay vi xem mot lan roi bo.

researchBasis.label: Segmenting and signaling
researchBasis.whyEn: Short watch cues reduce overload and highlight what the learner should notice.
researchBasis.whyVi: Cac goi y ngan luc xem giup giam qua tai va lam ro dieu nguoi hoc can chu y.

researchBasis.label: Bilingual support
researchBasis.whyEn: Each English line is paired with one concise Vietnamese cue rather than dense duplicate text.
researchBasis.whyVi: Moi dong tieng Anh di kem mot goi y tieng Viet ngan gon thay vi lap lai day dac.

pedagogicalFrame.rationaleEn: This lesson uses short preview cues, guided noticing, retrieval, and transfer so the learner does more than passively watch Academic Vocabulary.
pedagogicalFrame.rationaleVi: Bai hoc nay dung goi y ngan truoc khi xem, huong chu y, goi lai va van dung de nguoi hoc khong chi xem thu dong bai Từ vựng học thuật.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailEn: Use bilingual support as a cue, not as a wall of text that competes with the video.
pedagogicalFrame.designGuardrailVi: Dung ho tro song ngu nhu mot goi y, khong bien no thanh buc tu day dac tranh chu y voi video.

learningObjectives.en: Identify the main idea of Academic Vocabulary and keep attention on the right content cues.
learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Từ vựng học thuật va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

learningObjectives.en: Notice and recall core language such as Furthermore and In addition.
learningObjectives.vi: Nhan ra va goi lai ngon ngu cot loi nhu furthermore va addition.

learningObjectives.en: Use the video as input for exam-ready structure, evidence, and academic precision, then produce one short response of your own.
learningObjectives.vi: Dung video lam dau vao cho cấu trúc thi cử, dẫn chứng và độ chính xác học thuật, roi tu tao mot phan hoi ngan cua rieng minh.

learningObjectives.en: "Furthermore" is linked with In addition in this lesson.
learningObjectives.vi: "Furthermore" duoc gan voi In addition trong bai hoc nay.

learningObjectives.vi: Xac dinh y chinh cua bai Tiếng Anh Úc va giu su chu y vao cac dau hieu noi dung dung.

segments.vi: Chú ý từ đó nghĩa là gì và khi nào phù hợp về mặt xã hội khi video tap trung vao Tiếng Anh Úc.
